steps.title: Join contrast clauses
steps.content: The sentence joins two independent clauses: the poem dates back to the 3rd century BCE, and its heroic narrative still captivates modern readers. The connection should also signal contrast between ancient origin and modern appeal.

steps.title: Use comma plus conjunction
steps.content: A creates a comma splice, B puts the contrast word on the wrong side of the comma, and D creates an awkward new sentence with lowercase the while losing the contrast signal. The correct form uses a comma with a coordinating conjunction. The answer is C.
